chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5262 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing on Misc. No.23281/2024 3. For hearing of main case 12.12.2024 Mr. Ajeebullah advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Zakir advocate holds brief for Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent No.4 Ms. Rabia Khalid, Assistant Attorney General This petition essentially challenges Notification dated 07.10.2024, issued by the Government of Pakistan, Ministry of National Food Security and research Department of Plant Protection. The notification refers to complaints regarding authenticity of lab analysis of betel nut import consignments and denotes the measures taken by the Government in regard thereof; for the protection of the general populace. The primary prayer clause seeks to have the said notification declared null and void. Petitioner’s learned counsel was asked to identify the touchstone, rule, law etc., on the basis whereof the impugned notification was sought to be struck down. The counsel was further asked to demonstrate as to how the petitioner was aggrieved by the said notification. However, he remained unable to assist. No case has been set forth before us to merit the invocation of the discretionary1 writ jurisdiction of this Court; therefore, this petition, along with all pending applications, is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad 1Per Ijaz Ul Ahsan J. in Syed Iqbal Hussain Shah Gillani vs. PBC & Others reported as 2021 SCMR 425; Muhammad Fiaz Khan vs.
